活 动相 同 实 例不 同 实 例
硬件中断 (HW IRQ)否是
软件中断 (Soft IRQ)是是
tasklet否是
bottom half否否

活 动HW_IRQSoft-IRQtaskletbottom half
硬件中断 (HW IRQ)是否否否
软件中断 (Soft IRQ)是否否否
tasklet是否否否
bottom half是否否否
系统调用是是是是
进程是是是是
int request_irq(unsigned intirq,irqhandler_t handler,unsigned long flags,const char\*devname, void \*dev_id)
include <linuxSpinlock.h> spinlock_t my-spinlock \(\equiv\) SPIN_LOCK_UNLOCKED; //初始化锁变量，或使用函数，初始化锁变量 spin_lock_init( &my-spinlock) //将锁初始化为未锁定状态

spinlock_t mySpinlock \(=\) SPIN_LOCK_UNLOCKED; //活动A spin_lock(&mySpinlock); skb_a->next \(\equiv\) queue->next; queue->next \(\equiv\) skb_a; spin_unlock(&mySpinlock); ... //活动B spin_lock(&mySpinlock); skb_b->next \(\equiv\) queue->next; queue->next \(\equiv\) skb_b; spin_unlock(&mySpinlock);
